name: ifl-ios-standards
description: Reusable iOS engineering standards with provider-native Brain-Flow, specialist agents, Boardy/VIP task skills, bundled architecture standards, and scaffolders.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable iOS standards, agents, skills, and scaffolders
interface.longDescription: Brings reusable iOS engineering standards into Codex through provider-native Brain-Flow: one approved plan, continuous execution, semantic task commits, and one final AI consistency review. The plugin also ships pattern-neutral brain stage skills, Boardy/VIP task skills, specialist agents, bundled rulebook/spec/process standards, and Bazel module/board scaffolders. Reference paths shown as ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/standards/… resolve relative to this plugin root under Codex.
defaultPrompt: Set up iOS project bindings with the reusable standards
Review this Swift code against the iOS standards
Scaffold a Boardy/VIP module in module X
